expectations.text: Output file exists with the same base name as the source image and a .txt extension
Output contains the verbatim transcribed text from the diagram (titles, bullet points, and diagram labels)
expectations.evidence: Title 'Architecture agentique', the 5-bullet explanation block, 'TYPES DE RELATIONS', and the right-side diagram labels (HEAD AGENT, AGENT 1/2/3, PARALLÈLE, SÉQUENTIEL) are all present and match the source

expectations.text: Output contains a distinct 'Summary' section describing the diagram, clearly separated from the verbatim transcription
expectations.evidence: A '---' divider followed by 'Summary: Le schéma illustre...' appears at the end of the file, per the skill's specified output format

expectations.text: The summary is a brief description (a few sentences) of what the diagram shows, not a restatement of the transcribed text
expectations.evidence: The summary is a single paragraph synthesizing the orchestration patterns (parallel/sequential/hybrid) in different words than the transcription, not a copy of it

eval_feedback.overall: Clean pass on all four assertions; output follows the skill's defined format exactly.
